problem: Raw candidate content and accepted engineering knowledge were mixed in the same retrievable record.
resolution: Use temporary QA evidence plus canonical-only knowledge export; source_evidence stores provenance without rejected claim text.

problem: A single record type cannot describe microtopics that bridge equation, model and procedure roles.
resolution: Use primary_record_type plus record_types and atomicity rules.

problem: Verification status alone did not mechanically control retrieval eligibility.
resolution: Add verification.knowledge_exportable and canonical_verified_knowledge_only retention policy.

problem: Coordinate system, boundary conditions and sign conventions need typed context for advanced models.
resolution: Add typed model_context before production-scale mapping.

problem: Empirical correlations need explicit coefficient source, property-evaluation basis, units and range.
Graphical methods need axes, construction steps, interpolation rule and expected output metadata.
Spreadsheet knowledge needs sheet/range provenance and formula dependency lineage.
Design heuristics must be distinguished from laws, mechanistic models and empirical correlations.
resolution: Add knowledge_strength enum and competing-criteria fields.

problem: FEM verification targets need quantity, location, aggregation and expected convergence behavior.
Multibasis coefficients and shared governing-model parents need explicit conventions.
resolution: Add coefficient_basis and freeze relation vocabulary/parent rules.
